The ATS analyzer was a game-changer.' }, { name: 'Rahul Verma', role: 'Product Manager at Microsoft', text: 'The interview prep module gave me the confidence I needed. I aced my PM interviews thanks to the STAR method coaching.' }, { name: 'Ananya Patel', role: 'Data Scientist at Amazon', text: 'The career roadmap feature showed me exactly what skills I needed. I went from analyst to data scientist in 8 months.' }, ]; const faqs = [ { q: 'How does the ATS analyzer work?', a: 'Our AI scans your resume against industry ATS standards, checking formatting, keywords, section structure, readability, and impact. You get a detailed score with specific recommendations to improve.' }, { q: 'Can I export my resume as PDF?', a: 'Yes! You can export any resume you build as a professionally formatted PDF, ready to submit to employers.' }, { q: 'Is the AI feedback accurate?', a: 'Our AI is powered by Google Gemini and trained on thousands of successful resumes. While no AI is perfect, our feedback is highly actionable and based on real hiring patterns.' }, { q: 'How many resumes can I create?', a: 'Free users can create up to 3 resumes. Premium users get unlimited resumes, cover letters, and AI analyses.' }, { q: 'Is my data secure?', a: 'Absolutely. All data is encrypted and stored securely. We never share your personal information with third parties.' }, ]; export default function LandingPage() { const { user, loginWithRedirect } = useAuth(); const navigate = useNavigate(); const handleCTA = () => { if (user) navigate('/dashboard'); else loginWithRedirect({ initialView: 'signup' }); }; return (

actions.content:
You are an elite team of software architects, senior product managers, UX designers, senior frontend engineers, senior backend engineers, DevOps engineers, QA engineers, AI engineers, security specialists, and database architects.

Your objective is NOT to create a demo.

Your objective is to build a COMPLETE PRODUCTION READY SaaS product.

The application name is:

ASCEND

Tagline:

AI Career Platform

This application should be professional enough to compete with products like Resume.io, Enhancv, Rezi AI, Kickresume, Teal HQ, Jobscan, Huntr and other premium AI career platforms.

==================================================

CRITICAL REQUIREMENTS

==================================================

Everything must be production ready.

No placeholder pages.

No dummy functionality.

No fake APIs.

No mock responses.

No lorem ipsum.

Every feature must actually work.

Every button must work.

Every form must submit.

Every API must function.

Every AI feature must produce usable results.

The application should be deployable immediately after development.

==================================================

TECH STACK

==================================================

Choose the best modern stack.

Preferred:

Next.js latest

TypeScript

Tailwind CSS

Shadcn UI

React Query

Node.js

Express or NestJS

PostgreSQL

Prisma ORM

Redis

JWT Authentication

Google OAuth

GitHub OAuth

Razorpay

OpenAI

Google Gemini

PDF Parser

Docx Parser

AWS S3 or Cloudinary

Docker

CI/CD

==================================================

DESIGN

==================================================

Create an elegant premium UI.

Minimal.

Modern.

Fast.

Professional.

Responsive.

Apple level polish.

No flashy gradients.

No childish animations.

Everything should feel like a premium SaaS.

Use:

Rounded cards

Soft shadows

Excellent spacing

Dark mode

Light mode

Professional icons

Accessible colors

Keyboard navigation

Loading states

Empty states

Error states

Success states

==================================================

USER TYPES

==================================================

Guest

Free User

Premium User

Admin

Super Admin

==================================================

AUTHENTICATION

==================================================

Email Login

OTP

GitHub Login

JWT

Remember Me

HOME PAGE

==================================================

Professional landing page.

Hero section

Features

Testimonials

Pricing

CTA

Footer

SEO optimized

==================================================

DASHBOARD

==================================================

Professional dashboard with

Resume Score

Job Matches

Recent Analysis

Career Roadmap

Interview Readiness

Usage

Subscription

==================================================

MODULE 1

AI RESUME BUILDER

==================================================

Professional templates

Multiple templates

Modern templates

ATS templates

Live preview

Auto save

Import resume

Export PDF

Export DOCX

Custom fonts

Custom colors

Experience

Education

==================================================

MODULE 2

==================================================

Upload DOCX

Detect formatting

Readability

==================================================

JOB DESCRIPTION ANALYZER

MODULE 4

RESUME VS JD MATCH

==================================================

==================================================

MODULE 5

AI RESUME OPTIMIZER

==================================================

Rewrite bullet points

Improve grammar

Improve ATS score

Improve readability

==================================================

MODULE 6

Generate

Edit

==================================================

MODULE 7

AI INTERVIEW PREPARATION

==================================================

Mock interview

==================================================

MODULE 8

CAREER ROADMAP

==================================================

Career analysis

Career progression

==================================================

MODULE 9

JOB TRACKER

==================================================

Applied

==================================================

MODULE 10

LINKEDIN PROFILE REVIEW

==================================================

Headline review

About review

Experience review

Keyword optimization

Profile score

==================================================

MODULE 11

AI PROJECT GENERATOR

==================================================

Suggest projects

Portfolio ideas

GitHub ideas

==================================================

MODULE 12

ADMIN PANEL

==================================================

User management

Subscription management

Analytics

Payments

Coupons

Feature Flags

Support Tickets

Resume Analytics

AI Usage

Logs

==================================================

DATABASE

==================================================

Design complete normalized PostgreSQL schema.

Create all relationships.

Indexes.

Audit tables.

Soft delete.

Migration scripts.

==================================================

AI

==================================================

Use OpenAI and Gemini.

Prompt engineering.

Retry logic.

Caching.

Rate limiting.

Structured outputs.

==================================================

PAYMENTS

==================================================

Razorpay

Subscriptions

Monthly

Yearly

Coupons

Invoices

Webhook verification

==================================================

SECURITY

==================================================

Helmet

CORS

Rate limiting

CSRF

SQL Injection protection

XSS protection

Validation

Input sanitization

Password hashing

Encryption

==================================================

LOGGING

==================================================

Error logging

Audit logs

Activity logs

Admin logs

==================================================

TESTING

==================================================

Unit tests

Integration tests

E2E tests

==================================================

PERFORMANCE

==================================================

Server side rendering

Lazy loading

Caching

Image optimization

Pagination

Infinite scroll

Compression

==================================================

SEO

==================================================

Metadata

Sitemap

Robots

Schema

OpenGraph

Twitter Cards

==================================================

DEPLOYMENT

==================================================

Docker

Docker Compose

Production environment

CI/CD

Environment variables

Deployment guide

README

==================================================

IMPORTANT

==================================================

Never generate placeholder code.

Never simplify any module.

Every feature must work.

Follow enterprise architecture.

Follow clean architecture.

Use reusable components.

Generate maintainable code.

Write production quality code only.

Whenever a module is completed:

1. Test it.
2. Fix bugs.
3. Optimize.
4. Refactor.
5. Continue.

Never stop after creating UI.

Always complete backend, database, APIs, frontend, validation, testing and deployment for every module before moving to the next module.

Continue until the entire SaaS application is complete and production deployable.
